sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check what changed after clicking on the blue bar.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking on the blue bar
before_nodes = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
after_nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in after_nodes:
    bm = [bn for bn in before_nodes if bn['color'] == n['color'] and bn['hash'] == n['hash']]
    if len(bm) > 0:
        bm0 = bm[0]
        if bm0['boundary'] != n['boundary']:
            print("Node " + str(n['id']) + " " + n['color'] + ": " + str(bm0['boundary']) + " -> " + str(n['boundary']))
    else:
        print("Node " + str(n['id']) + " (" + n['color'] + "): NEW")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
